name: glib-gir
description: GIRepository-3.0), built from the matching glib sources with introspection
enabled. Works around vcpkg shipping glib with -Dintrospection=disabled.
This is a leaf port (nothing depends back on it), so depending on glib and
gobject-introspection here does not form the glib<->g-i cycle that blocks an
introspection feature on glib itself. It compiles glib a second time and
installs only the typelibs/girs, so it does not conflict with the glib port.
